title: Jonny RaZeR's Ultimate Weapon
description: Based on a Jonny RaZeR YouTube short that he did about an idea he had for a weapon in a video game.
body: I saw a Jonny RaZeR short about an amazing weapon idea and I knew I had to make it real. You can view the video [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LlwP3sUNIJA). This weapon was designed for you to speedrun against your friends with this and it will ensure it does not take too long. When you strike an enemy with it they will be teleported away making it very useful for attacking enemies, especially players. It has a crafting recipe, however that is for you to figure out. I will say you will want to go caving for rare resources like a diamond and amethyst shard to get this item. This mod was made using MCreator, go check them out.
